title: phyllanthus pseudoniruri
intro: Phyllanthus pseudoniruri, also known as Lizard's Tail, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and aid in digestion. The health benefits of Phyllanthus pseudoniruri include reducing inflammation and pain, improving liver function, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus pseudoniruri are typically made by drying the plant's leaves and stems, and can be consumed as tea, capsules, or tinctures.
